buildingDetails.clickToView: Click on any structure to view details

confirmDialog.title: Confirm
confirmDialog.message: Are you sure you want to demolish this building?

dialog.selectMessage: Are you sure to upgrade {building} ? It will cost {cost} credits.
dialog.relocateMessage: Are you sure to relocate {building} ?
dialog.demolishMessage: Are you sure to demolish {building} ? You will get {refund} credits back.

restorePrompt.title: Continue Last Game?
restorePrompt.description: Previous game save detected. Would you like to continue?
restorePrompt.musicHint: 🎵 Click the music button in the top right corner
restorePrompt.gpuHint: ⚡ Enable GPU acceleration in chrome://flags for better gaming experience

selectMode.title: Selection Mode
selectMode.description: Click any building in the scene to view detailed information and statistics

buildMode.title: Build Mode
buildMode.description: Select a building type from the sidebar, then click on any empty tile to construct it
buildMode.strategicTipText: Power supply, environmental factors, and resident satisfaction directly impact population growth and coin production
buildMode.cameraTip: Press <kbd class="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-blue-500 text-white rounded text-xs font-bold">←</kbd> or <kbd class="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-blue-500 text-white rounded text-xs font-bold">→</kbd> to adjust the direction of the camera

relocateMode.title: Relocation Mode
relocateMode.relocateHint: Click tile A then tile B to relocate building
relocateMode.requirementsText:
Tile A must have a building
Tile B must be empty
relocateMode.cancelHint: Press <kbd class="px-1 py-0.5 bg-red-700 rounded text-xs">ESC</kbd> to cancel

demolishMode.title: Demolition Mode
demolishMode.description: Click on any building in the scene to demolish it permanently
demolishMode.recoveryText: 70% of construction materials will be refunded to your inventory
